violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Food debris in handwash sink in deli area.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Mount paper towel and hand soap dispensers in deli area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean under slushy machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors, floor edges under equipment in kitchen.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
